posts.author: amymah (Amy Mah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi, I think it would be cool if we could have the ability to order new incoming items to the top of the list in a board.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m hoping that there is an alternative view or option of how to order incoming items, so that we can either have new items appear at the bottom of an item list of a board or at the top of the list.
